event_title: Composable and Streamable Play! Apps (in SF) — joint event with Play Framework
title: Composable and Streamable Play! Apps (in SF) — joint event with Play Framework
description: Folks -- we're running a special Play meetup with our friends at Nitro and Play Framework: http://www.meetup.com/PlayFramework/events/180580192/ Please sign up there. Play, Akka, and related technologies are covered in depth at the SF Scala annual conference, Scala By the Bay (http://www.scalabythebay.org), this year held at Fort Mason on August 8-9. We run a Typesafe-Certified Fast Track to Scala (http://www.scalabythebay.org/files/scala_training_deck.pdf) course on August 6-7 for those who want to dive deep into Play right away and take advantage of its Scala foundation. SF Scala and Play Framework members receive a special limited discount on the training -- look for it in your meetup email, or email registration@scalabythebay.org if you want one. The discount and Early Bird pricing expire TONIGHT!
